steps.title: Identify the target point on the graph
steps.content: Since $x$ represents months after the end of November 2011, the value $x = 0$ corresponds exactly to the end of November 2011. We need to find the $y$-value (number of active projects) at this point on the graph.

steps.title: Read y from the graph at x = 0
steps.content: Looking at the curve at $x = 0$ on the horizontal axis, the graph shows the point $(0, 8)$. The predicted number of active projects at the end of November 2011 was therefore 8. That matches choice B — B is correct.
